skip_reason: The bookmarklet only works when a specific photo/video/360 lightbox is open and the page URL contains a '!6s(https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/...)' segment. This requires interactive navigation (clicking into the photo viewer) which isn't reproduced by simply loading target_url.
notes: Passive - V9 modal (id: __gmapsPhotoModal) titled 'Google Maps Photo Extractor'. Extracts a googleusercontent.com photo URL from location.href (matching '!6s(https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/...)'), upgrades it to full resolution ('=s0-k-no'), and shows a modal with the raw URL, full-size URL, and an embedded preview image. Without a lightbox open, location.href won't contain the !6s segment and the bookmarklet shows an alert('No Google Maps photo URL found in the current URL.').

checks.text_contains: Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training
